item.command:
/bin/bash -lc "python - <<'PY'
import os, json, pandas as pd
files = [
'./desktop/product/product/development-task/development-task-list.xlsx',
'./desktop/product/product/development-task/development-task-2.xlsx',
'./desktop/product/product/development-task/development-task-3.xlsx'
]
for path in files:
    xl = pd.ExcelFile(path)
    print('FILE', path)
    print('SHEETS', xl.sheet_names)
    for s in xl.sheet_names:
        df = pd.read_excel(path, sheet_name=s)
        print('SHEET', s, 'SHAPE', df.shape)
        print(df.head(3).to_json(orient='records', force_ascii=False))
        break
PY"

/bin/bash -lc "python - <<'PY'
import os, json, pandas as pd
files = [
'./desktop/product/product/development-task/development-task-list.xlsx',
'./desktop/product/product/development-task/development-task-2.xlsx',
'./desktop/product/product/development-task/development-task-3.xlsx'
]
for path in files:
    xl = pd.ExcelFile(path)
    print('FILE', path)
    print('SHEETS', xl.sheet_names)
    for s in xl.sheet_names:
        df = pd.read_excel(path, sheet_name=s)
        print('SHEET', s, 'SHAPE', df.shape)
        print(df.head(3).to_json(orient='records', force_ascii=False))
        break
PY"

item.command:
/bin/bash -lc "python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('model_output/project-management/DevTask_Dashboard.html')
print(p.exists(), p.stat().st_size)
print(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')[:300])
PY"
